para.verbatim: if all vertices of a mesh connected component are present in selection, excludes these vertices
expands given seeds to whole components
gets all connected components of mesh part \\note be careful, if mesh is large enough and has many components, the memory overflow will occur

memberdef.argsstring: (MeshPart meshPart, int maxComponentCount, MeshComponents.FaceIncidence incidence='FaceIncidence::PerEdge', UndirectedEdgeBitSet isCompBd='{}')
memberdef.name: getAllComponents

para.verbatim: gets all connected components of mesh part \\detail if components number more than the maxComponentCount, they will be combined into groups of the same size \\param maxComponentCount should be more then 1 \\return pair components bitsets vector and number components in one group if components number more than maxComponentCount

memberdef.argsstring: (Face2RegionMap componentsMap, int componentsCount, FaceBitSet region, int maxComponentCount)
memberdef.name: getAllComponents

para.verbatim: gets all connected components from components map ( FaceId => RegionId ) \\detail if components number more than the maxComponentCount, they will be combined into groups of the same size (this similarly changes componentsMap) \\param maxComponentCount should be more then 1 \\return components bitsets vector
subdivides given edges on connected components
gets all connected components of mesh part as 1. the mapping: FaceId -> Component ID in [0, 1, 2, ...) 2. the total number of components
subdivides given edges on connected components
gets all connected components of mesh part
gets all connected components, separating vertices by given path (either closed or from boundary to boundary)
gets all connected components, separating vertices by given paths (either closed or from boundary to boundary)

memberdef.argsstring: (MeshPart meshPart, FaceId id, MeshComponents.FaceIncidence incidence='FaceIncidence::PerEdge', UndirectedEdgeBitSet isCompBd='{}')
memberdef.name: getComponent

para.verbatim: returns one connected component containing given face, not effective to call more than once, if several components are needed use getAllComponents
returns one connected component containing given vertex, not effective to call more than once, if several components are needed use getAllComponentsVerts

memberdef.argsstring: (MeshPart meshPart, FaceBitSet seeds, MeshComponents.FaceIncidence incidence='FaceIncidence::PerEdge', UndirectedEdgeBitSet isCompBd='{}')
memberdef.name: getComponents

para.verbatim: returns union of connected components, each of which contains at least one seed face

memberdef.argsstring: (MeshTopology topology, FaceBitSet seeds, FaceBitSet region=None, MeshComponents.FaceIncidence incidence='FaceIncidence::PerEdge', UndirectedEdgeBitSet isCompBd='{}')
memberdef.name: getComponents

para.verbatim: returns union of connected components, each of which contains at least one seed edge
returns union of connected components, each of which contains at least one seed vert
returns the union of connected components, each having at least given area

memberdef.argsstring: (MeshPart meshPart, UnionFind_FaceId unionFind, float minArea, UndirectedEdgeBitSet outBdEdgesBetweenLargeComps=None)
memberdef.name: getLargeByAreaComponents

para.verbatim: given prepared union-find structure returns the union of connected components, each having at least given area

memberdef.argsstring: (MeshPart meshPart, Face2RegionMap regionMap, int numRegions, float minArea)
memberdef.name: getLargeByAreaRegions

para.verbatim: returns 1. the union of all regions with area >= minArea 2. the number of such regions

memberdef.argsstring: (MeshPart meshPart, float minArea, float angleFromPlanar, UndirectedEdgeBitSet outBdEdgesBetweenLargeComps=None)
memberdef.name: getLargeByAreaSmoothComponents

para.verbatim: returns the union of connected components, each having at least given area, and any two faces in a connected component have a path along the surface across the edges, where surface does not deviate from plane more than on given angle
returns the union of vertex connected components, each having at least \\param minVerts vertices

memberdef.argsstring: (MeshPart meshPart, MeshComponents.FaceIncidence incidence='FaceIncidence::PerEdge', UndirectedEdgeBitSet isCompBd='{}', float minArea=0, int_output numSmallerComponents=None)
memberdef.name: getLargestComponent

para.verbatim: returns the largest by surface area component or empty set if its area is smaller than \\param minArea
returns the largest by number of elements component
returns requested number of largest by area connected components in descending by area order
returns the number of connected components in mesh part
computes the area of each region given via the map
gets union-find structure for faces with different options of face-connectivity

memberdef.argsstring: (MeshTopology topology, FaceBitSet region=None, MeshComponents.FaceIncidence incidence='FaceIncidence::PerEdge', UndirectedEdgeBitSet isCompBd='{}')
memberdef.name: getUnionFindStructureFaces

para.verbatim: gets union-find structure for faces with connectivity by shared edge, and optional edge predicate whether to skip uniting components over it it is guaranteed that isCompBd is invoked in a thread-safe manner (that left and right face are always processed by one thread)
gets union-find structure for all undirected edges in \\param mesh \\param allPointToRoots if true, then every element in the structure will point directly to the root of its respective component
gets union-find structure for vertices
gets union-find structure for vertices, considering connections by given edges only
gets union-find structure for vertices, considering connections by given undirected edges only
gets union-find structure for vertices, considering connections by all edges excluding given ones
\\brief gets union-find structure for vertices, separating vertices by given path (either closed or from boundary to boundary) \\param outPathVerts this set receives all vertices passed by the path
returns true if all vertices of a mesh connected component are present in selection
This is a namespace.
